name: hermes-electron-app
description: Prometeo Hermes desktop console for cross-platform agent management

scripts.build:app: npm run build:ts && npm run build:service && npm run build:assets && npm run build:native && npm run prepare:package
scripts.build: npm run build:app && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never
scripts.start: npm run build:ts && npm run build:service && npm run build:assets && node scripts/run-electron.js
scripts.start:local: cross-env-shell NODE_ENV=development HERMES_CHANNEL=local "npm run build:ts && npm run build:service && npm run build:assets && node scripts/run-electron.js"
scripts.service:status:local: cross-env NODE_ENV=development HERMES_CHANNEL=local node scripts/service-command.js status
scripts.service:install:local: cross-env NODE_ENV=development HERMES_CHANNEL=local node scripts/service-command.js install
scripts.service:start:local: cross-env NODE_ENV=development HERMES_CHANNEL=local node scripts/service-command.js start
scripts.service:stop:local: cross-env NODE_ENV=development HERMES_CHANNEL=local node scripts/service-command.js stop
scripts.service:uninstall:local: cross-env NODE_ENV=development HERMES_CHANNEL=local node scripts/service-command.js uninstall
